title: Space/set two-phase validation is worth defending
description: Phase 1 (validate+collect) / Phase 2 (write) pattern in space_set is correct and should not be 'simplified'. A future contributor might suggest merging the validate and write loops. Don't. The only way to satisfy RFC 8620 §7.1 atomicity for input errors — where a bad role or wrong-type name must reject the whole patch with zero writes — is to fully validate before touching the store. The SimplePropPatch enum with exhaustive match arms is also load-bearing: it makes compiler catch any new property added to is_simple_space_prop without a corresponding Phase 2 arm.
